name: Persuasion Writing
description: Applies psychological principles and persuasion techniques to write copy that influences decisions and drives action, using frameworks like AIDA, PAS, and emotional drivers.

variables.name: goal
variables.description: Desired action: purchase, sign-up, click, download

variables.name: audience
variables.description: Target audience and their current mindset

variables.name: objections
variables.description: Primary objections or barriers to action

variables.name: emotional_drivers
variables.description: Key emotional drivers: fear, belonging, status, achievement

variables.name: framework
variables.description: Persuasion framework: AIDA, PAS, Problem-Agitate-Solve, Hero's Journey
